codeReview.summary: The correction packet makes the posted-document correction flow explicit in both O2C and P2P: sales and purchase return previews are now surfaced through dedicated DTOs and endpoints, return posting paths enforce posted-source and remaining-quantity guards, and replayed returns relink movements back to the original correction journal instead of duplicating inventory truth. The period-close core also now counts correction-linkage gaps by inspecting correction journals for missing provenance fields, and the reviewed regression/controller/invariant tests cover over-return blocking, replay reuse, CRN prefix listing, and close failure on missing correction linkage.

summary: Pass. Posted sales and purchase documents are corrected through linked preview-plus-return flows, replay keeps inventory and journal linkage single-sourced, and period close now fails closed when correction provenance drifts.
